zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Ferrers於大約1224年出生在英國德比夏爾德比時，她的父親Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby33歲，母親Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby24歲。她於1240年6月18日之前與Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1260年11月26日在英國英格蘭戴文托爾莫胡享年37歲，埋葬在英國戴文阿可明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Ferrers于大约1224年出生在英国德比夏爾德比时，她的父亲Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby33岁，母亲Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby24岁。她于1240年6月18日之前与Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1260年11月26日在英国英格兰戴文托爾莫胡享年37岁，埋葬在英国戴文阿可明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Ferrers was born about 1224, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, was 33 and her mother, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, was 24. She married Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe before 18 June 1240, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 26 November 1260, in Tormohun, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Axminster, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Ferrers est née environ 1224, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe avant 18 juin 1240, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 26 novembre 1260, à Tormohun, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Ferrers um 1224 in Derby, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby 33 und ihre Mutter Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby 24. Sie hat vor 18. Juni 1240 in England Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 26. November 1260 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Tormohun, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Axminster, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Ferrers è nata il circa 1224 nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe prima del 18 giugno 1240, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 26 novembre 1260, nel Tormohun, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Axminster, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Ferrersが約1224年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで生まれた時，父Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derbyは33歳，母Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derbyは24歳であった。1240年6月18日以前にイギリスでGilbert Basssett of Wycombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1260年11月26日にイギリスイギリスデボントルモハンで37歳で死去し，イギリスデボンアクスミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Ferrers(이)가 대략 1224년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1240년 6월 18일 이전 영국에서 Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 11월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 토모헌에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 액민스터에 묻혔다.

mn.Tormohun, Devon, England: Tormohun, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Dunster, Somerset, England: Dunster, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Ferrers nasceu aproximadamente 1224, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe antes 18 de junho de 1240, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 26 de novembro de 1260, em Tormohun, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Ferrers родилась около 1224 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe перед 18 июнь 1240 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 26 ноября 1260 г. в местности тормохун, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Ferrers nació aproximadamente 1224, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gilbert Basssett of Wycombe antes de 18 de junio de 1240, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 26 de noviembre de 1260, en Tormohun, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.
